content:
{
  "dialogues": [
    {
      "title": "在咖啡店遇到朋友",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "欸，你怎麼也在這裡？好久不見！",
          "pinyin": "Ēi, nǐ zěnme yě zài zhèlǐ? Hǎojiǔ bùjiàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ei1, ni3 zen3me ye3 zai4 zhe4li3? Hao3jiu3 bu4jian4!",
          "translation_en": "Hey, what are you doing here? Long time no see!",
          "translation_ko": "어, 너도 여기 있었네? 오랜만이야!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "對啊，我剛下班，想說來買杯咖啡。你呢？",
          "pinyin": "Duì a, wǒ gāng xiàbān, xiǎng shuō lái mǎi bēi kāfēi. Nǐ ne?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Dui4 a, wo3 gang1 xia4ban1, xiang3 shuo1 lai2 mai3 bei1 ka1fei1. Ni3 ne?",
          "translation_en": "Yeah, I just got off work and thought I'd grab a coffee. How about you?",
          "translation_ko": "응, 방금 퇴근해서 커피 한 잔 사러 왔어. 너는?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "我來買一杯拿鐵，等一下要回去公司加班。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ lái mǎi yī bēi nǎtiě, děng yīxià yào huíqù gōngsī jiābān.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 lai2 mai3 yi1 bei1 na3tie3, deng3 yi1xia4 yao4 hui2qu4 gong1si1 jia1ban1.",
          "translation_en": "I came to buy a latte; I have to go back to the office to work overtime later.",
          "translation_ko": "나는 라떼 한 잔 사러 왔어, 곧 회사에 돌아가서 야근해야 해."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "辛苦了！那你要不要順便吃點東西？",
          "pinyin": "Xīnkǔ le! Nà nǐ yào bùyào shùnbiàn chī diǎn dōngxī?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Xin1ku3 le! Na4 ni3 yao4 bu4yao4 shun4bian4 chi1 dian3 dong1xi1?",
          "translation_en": "That sounds tough! Do you want to grab a bite to eat while you're at it?",
          "translation_ko": "수고했어! 그럼 너 뭐 좀 먹을래?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不用了，我剛剛已經吃過晚餐了。",
          "pinyin": "Bùyòng le, wǒ gānggāng yǐjīng chī guò wǎncān le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4yong4 le, wo3 gang1gang1 yi3jing1 chi1 guo4 wan3can1 le.",
          "translation_en": "No thanks, I already had dinner just now.",
          "translation_ko": "괜찮아, 아까 저녁 먹었어."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "好吧，那下次有空我們再約吃飯！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo ba, nà xià cì yǒu kòng wǒmen zài yuē chīfàn!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 ba, na4 xia4 ci4 you3 kong4 wo3men zai4 yue1 chi1fan4!",
          "translation_en": "Alright, then let's make plans to have a meal together next time we're free!",
          "translation_ko": "그래, 그럼 다음에 시간 되면 밥 먹자!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好啊，再聯絡！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo a, zài liánluò!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 a, zai4 lian2luo4!",
          "translation_en": "Sure, let's keep in touch!",
          "translation_ko": "응, 연락할게!"
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "What did person A buy?",
          "question_ko": "A는 무엇을 샀습니까?",
          "options_en": ["A latte", "A coffee", "A tea"],
          "options_ko": ["라떼", "커피", "차"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you meet a friend at a coffee shop. Describe what you say and do."
    },
    {
      "title": "在便利商店買東西",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "歡迎光臨！請問需要什麼？",
          "pinyin": "Huānyíng guānglín! Qǐngwèn xūyào shénme?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Huan1ying2 guang1lin2! Qing3wen4 xu1yao4 shen2me?",
          "translation_en": "Welcome! What can I help you with?",
          "translation_ko": "어서 오세요! 무엇을 도와드릴까요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我要一個茶葉蛋和一杯小杯的熱拿鐵。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yào yī gè cháyèdàn hé yī bēi xiǎo bēi de rè nǎtiě.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yao4 yi1 ge4 cha2ye4dan4 he2 yi1 bei1 xiao3 bei1 de re4 na3tie3.",
          "translation_en": "I'd like one tea egg and a small hot latte.",
          "translation_ko": "차 한 알과 작은 컵 따뜻한 라떼 하나 주세요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，總共是六十五塊。請問要怎麼付款？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, zǒnggòng shì liùshíwǔ kuài. Qǐngwèn yào zěnme fùkuǎn?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, zong3gong4 shi4 liu4shi2wu3 kuai4. Qing3wen4 yao4 zen3me fu4kuan3?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, that'll be 65 dollars total. How would you like to pay?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 총 65원입니다. 어떻게 결제하시겠습니까?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "我用悠遊卡付款。",
          "pinyin": "Wǒ yòng yōuyóukǎ fùkuǎn.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Wo3 yong4 you1you2ka3 fu4kuan3.",
          "translation_en": "I'll pay with my EasyCard.",
          "translation_ko": "유유카드로 결제할게요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "店員",
          "text": "好的，請感應卡片。需要載具嗎？",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, qǐng gǎnyìng kǎpiàn. Xūyào zàijù ma?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, qing3 gan3ying4 ka3pian4. Xu1yao4 zai4ju4 ma?",
          "translation_en": "Okay, please tap your card. Do you need a receipt for the invoice?",
          "translation_ko": "네, 카드를 대 주세요. 영수증이 필요하신가요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "客人",
          "text": "不用，謝謝。",
          "pinyin": "Bùyòng, xièxiè.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4yong4, xie4xie4.",
          "translation_en": "No, thank you.",
          "translation_ko": "아니요, 괜찮습니다."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "How much did the customer pay?",
          "question_ko": "손님은 얼마를 지불했습니까?",
          "options_en": ["65 dollars", "60 dollars", "70 dollars"],
          "options_ko": ["65원", "60원", "70원"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you are at a convenience store. Describe what you buy and how you pay."
    },
    {
      "title": "問路去醫院",
      "turns": [
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "不好意思，請問醫院怎麼走？",
          "pinyin": "Bù hǎo yìsi, qǐngwèn yīyuàn zěnme zǒu?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 hao3 yi4si, qing3wen4 yi1yuan4 zen3me zou3?",
          "translation_en": "Excuse me, how do I get to the hospital?",
          "translation_ko": "실례합니다, 병원에 어떻게 가나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "你往前走，到第二個路口左轉，就會看到了。",
          "pinyin": "Nǐ wǎng qián zǒu, dào dì èr gè lùkǒu zuǒ zhuǎn, jiù huì kàn dào le.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Ni3 wang3 qian2 zou3, dao4 di4 er4 ge4 lu4kou3 zuo3 zhuan3, jiu4 hui4 kan4 dao4 le.",
          "translation_en": "Go straight ahead, turn left at the second intersection, and you'll see it.",
          "translation_ko": "앞으로 가서 두 번째 사거리에서 좌회전하면 보일 거예요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "大概要走多久？",
          "pinyin": "Dàgài yào zǒu duō jiǔ?",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Da4gai4 yao4 zou3 duo1 jiu3?",
          "translation_en": "About how long will it take to walk?",
          "translation_ko": "걸어서 얼마나 걸리나요?"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "差不多十分鐘。",
          "pinyin": "Chàbùduō shí fēnzhōng.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Cha4bu4duo1 shi2 fen1zhong1.",
          "translation_en": "About ten minutes.",
          "translation_ko": "대략 10분 정도요."
        },
        {
          "speaker": "A",
          "text": "好的，謝謝你！",
          "pinyin": "Hǎo de, xièxiè nǐ!",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Hao3 de, xie4xie4 ni3!",
          "translation_en": "Okay, thank you!",
          "translation_ko": "네, 감사합니다!"
        },
        {
          "speaker": "B",
          "text": "不客氣，小心走。",
          "pinyin": "Bù kèqì, xiǎoxīn zǒu.",
          "pinyin_numeric": "Bu4 ke4qi4, xiao3xin1 zou3.",
          "translation_en": "You're welcome, walk safely.",
          "translation_ko": "천만에요, 조심히 가세요."
        }
      ],
      "comprehension_questions": [
        {
          "question_en": "Where does person A want to go?",
          "question_ko": "A는 어디로 가고 싶어 합니까?",
          "options_en": ["The hospital", "The school", "The park"],
          "options_ko": ["병원", "학교", "공원"],
          "correct_index": 0
        }
      ],
      "shadowing_prompt": "Repeat each sentence after the speaker, focusing on tone and natural rhythm.",
      "free_response_prompt": "Imagine you are asking for directions to a hospital. Describe the conversation."
    }
  ]
}
